title: Smoked Chicken Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole loaded with smoked chicken, creamy sauce, and a crunchy topping.
instructions: Cook the casserole mix according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked casserole mix, melted cheese mixture, and shredded cheddar cheese.
Stir in the milk until well combined.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange half of the cooked chicken.
Pour the casserole mixture over the chicken.
Top with remaining chicken and crushed crackers.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
